definitions.text: Area or situation which screens a person or thing from view.
examples: The soldiers took cover behind a ruined building.

definitions.text: The front and back of a book, magazine, CD package, etc.
Of or pertaining to the front cover of a book or magazine.
Of, pertaining to, or consisting of cover versions.
To place something over or upon, as to conceal or protect.
examples: He covered the baby with a blanket.
When the pot comes to a boil, cover it and reduce the heat to medium.

definitions.text: To be over or upon, as to conceal or protect.
To be upon all of, so as to completely conceal.
examples: Regular hexagons can cover the plane.
